---
output: pdf_document
---
# DeepSeek V3 0324 vs OpenAI: GPT-4o-mini
```{r prompt-histograms-individual, echo=TRUE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
# Load necessary package
library(ggplot2)

# Read the CSV file
data1 <- read.csv("field_responses_openai_gpt-4o-mini_500B.csv")
data2 <- read.csv("field_responses_openai_gpt-4o-mini_500.csv")

# Create a bar chart of industry frequencies
ggplot(data1, aes(x = field)) +
  geom_bar(fill = "skyblue", color = "black") +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Number of Requests per Field of Research (DeepSeek)",
       x = "Faculty",
       y = "Number of Requests") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))

# Create a bar chart of industry frequencies
ggplot(data2, aes(x = field)) +
  geom_bar(fill = "skyblue", color = "black") +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(title = "Number of Requests per Field of Research (DeepSeek)",
       x = "Faculty",
       y = "Number of Requests") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))


```

</div></pre>
